creator: sdalu@sdalu.com
text:
Failed to build due to following error (see attachement for full poudriere log)

npm ERR! This is an error with npm itself. Please report this error at:
npm ERR!     <https://npm.community>ESC[39m
child_process.js:650
    throw err;
    ^

Error: Command failed: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/atom/work/atom-1.44.0/apm/node_modules/atom-package-manager/bin/apm install

  at Object.<anonymous> (/wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/atom/work/atom-1.44.0/script/build:74:3)
